summary: Completed comprehensive testing of account-based favorites feature. All features working correctly including auth gate redirect, login redirect back, backend API CRUD, and UI toggle states. Previous issue (mobile venue cards missing heart buttons) has been FIXED.
critical_code_review_comments: FavoritesContext correctly merges localStorage favorites to DB on login, then clears localStorage
Auth gate properly redirects to /login?redirect=currentPath when clicking heart while not authenticated
Backend favorites.py uses MongoDB $addToSet for idempotent adds and $pull for removes
VenueSearchPage MobileVenueCard (lines 459-534) now includes heart button with useFavorites hook
VenueCard desktop version at lines 120-131 has matching heart button implementation
seed_data_creation: Used test venues: venue_658884a4e9c1, venue_563b92aa473c for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All favorites features working. Key data-testids: venue-card-fav-{venue_id} (both desktop and mobile), sidebar-favorite-btn (detail page sidebar), favorite-button (detail page hero), header-favorites-btn (header heart icon), favorite-venue-{venue_id} (favorites page cards), remove-favorite-{venue_id} (favorites page remove btn). Auth gate redirects to /login?redirect=currentPath. Backend endpoints: GET/POST/DELETE /api/favorites, POST /api/favorites/merge, DELETE /api/favorites (clear all).
